danger_signals.visual_form: Colored bullet patterns filling screen space, varying speeds and trajectories
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate threat requiring evasion; density indicates danger level

danger_signals.visual_form: Shield bar reduction on HUD, visual feedback on ship
danger_signals.meaning: Player vulnerability increasing; armor exposure imminent

danger_signals.visual_form: Large enemy sprite with complex attack patterns, screen-filling presence
danger_signals.meaning: Major threat encounter; significant damage potential

danger_signals.visual_form: Multiple hostile entities coordinating attacks across screen
Fixed/indestructible terrain elements blocking safe passage

danger_signals.signal: Red/dark visual palette in level design
danger_signals.visual_form: Warm-toned hostile environments, hostile planetary biomes

safety_signals.visual_form: Shield bar incrementally restoring over time when not taking damage
safety_signals.meaning: Reprieve period; player given brief recovery window

safety_signals.visual_form: Purple orbs and colored pickup pods from destroyed enemies
safety_signals.meaning: Resource gain; weapon upgrade opportunity in arcade mode

safety_signals.visual_form: Safe menu interface allowing customization between levels
safety_signals.meaning: Safe haven; moment of planning and resource management

safety_signals.visual_form: Uncluttered screen areas with minimal enemy presence
Story-based narrative pickups available between combat
safety_signals.meaning: World context being revealed; brief narrative safety

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Militaristic drone design; industrial/mechanical aesthetic in enemy ships and ground assets
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Hostile industrial worlds; Tyrian planet (where MicroSol operates) features industrial/mining environment; militaristic base structures
Contrasting safer/liberated planetary environments; absence of MicroSol industrial aesthetic

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Dragonhead/Dragonwing ship designs in arcade mode
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Player-controlled craft; customizable appearance through weapon/component selection
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Player ship aesthetic drives visual identity across all modes

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level theming shifts from industrial MicroSol territory to liberated Savara regions; environmental aesthetics change
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy types and difficulty scale with story progression; boss encounters mark narrative beats

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Hard difficulty and above: enemies with enhanced visual presence; possible line-of-sight cone limiting player vision
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies fire more projectiles per second; increased health pools visible through prolonged combat; hidden levels only appear at hard difficulty

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Industrial drone and ship designs dominate early levels; Tyrian planet shows mining/corporate infrastructure
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Hostile drones actively hunt player; militaristic coordinated enemy patterns

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Weapon upgrade visual intensity increases; ship customization options expand; sidekick additions add visual bulk to player formation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player firepower output increases visibly through enhanced projectile effects; ship maneuverability reflected in sprite responsiveness

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Message cubes present contextual narrative framing; level selection reflects player choice branches
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy encounters and environmental challenges vary based on narrative choice

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Arcade mode: minimal narrative UI, emphasis on colorful powerup drops and enemy variety; Story mode: customization menus and message cube presentation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Arcade: rapid pacing, immediate powerup gratification; Story: deliberate progression with ship customization phases

environmental_storytelling.example: Tyrian planet shows industrial mining facilities and MicroSol infrastructure; contrasts with Savara's freer aesthetic
Collectible story elements scattered through levels; player discovers Buce's death warning and MicroSol's Gravitium conspiracy through environmental pickups
MicroSol drones visually distinct as militaristic/industrial; enemy variety reflects territorial control and technological sophistication
Story branches represent player's flight from MicroSol-controlled space toward Savara safety; visual environments transition from hostile industrial to liberated zones
Different shops in different levels stock different equipment, suggesting regional variation and story-dependent resource availability

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Responsive maneuvering; forward-focused firepower; picks up front weapon powerups (purple orbs)
Slower, heavily armored; rear weapon focus reoriented forward in arcade mode; picks up rear powerups

entity_behavioral_tells.entity: Combined Steel Dragon (arcade mode - two player)
entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: First player controls combined ship; second player operates turret; visual representation of combined strength
Aggressive pursuit patterns; eliminates allies (Buce); militaristic coordinated fire
Pattern-based bullet formations; screen-filling presence; scales with difficulty
Complex multi-phase attack patterns; screen-dominant visual presence; story-gated appearance
Auxiliary fire synchronized with main weapon; visual flanking formation; some have limited ammunition requiring manual activation
Layered protection visualization; regeneration occurs passively when safe; visual indicator shows health status

notes: Tyrian communicates world-state primarily through environmental theming, enemy design language, and narrative progression markers. The MicroSol faction identity is established through industrialized aesthetics and drone design rather than explicit color/symbol systems. Safety vs. danger is conveyed through screen density, enemy behavior patterns, and HUD feedback (shield/armor bars). The story of corporate conspiracy and escape is told through message cube collection and level progression geography rather than cinematic sequences. Arcade and Story modes present different manifestation priorities: arcade emphasizes immediate powerup feedback and visual intensity, while story mode emphasizes customization menus and narrative framing. Difficulty levels alter enemy behavior and visual presentation (line-of-sight mechanics), creating multiple world-state interpretations of the same content.
